subject: Following up
body: Just following up on my previous message. Wanted to check if you had a chance to review when you get a moment, no rush.
notes: Low-stakes follow-up recently surfaced+skipped -> suppression lowers it (no floor blocks).

subject: Re: scheduling
body: Thanks, no further action needed from your side. Just closing the loop on this one.
notes: Situation already resolved in memory -> not re-opened; suppressed to quiet FYI.

subject: Re: runway
body: Following up on my earlier note about the cap table and valuation, no rush at all.
notes: Even with skip history, investor floor blocks suppression -> stays ASK.

body: Following up bhai, did you see my message about the weekend?
notes: Personal floor blocks suppression even after skips -> stays ASK.

subject: Re: invoice
body: Just bumping this - the invoice payment is still outstanding, balance due on the wire.
notes: Skip history lets suppression lower the would-be tier, but the money guardrail FLOOR holds it at APPROVE (never silent). expected_tier=2 is the safety guarantee.

subject: Confirming the order
body: Great speaking yesterday. Just confirming we're moving forward with the order as discussed, will send the invoice shortly.

decided.decision: declined this vendor, told them no

notes: Resolved situation lets suppression lower the tier, but the invoice money FLOOR holds it at APPROVE. expected_tier=2 is the safety guarantee.

subject: Quick sync?
body: Hey, free for a quick sync this afternoon? Want to align on the roadmap.
notes: VIP = always-instant; never quieted even with skip history (suppression skipped). VIP+needs_reply floors to APPROVE, then the moderate-confidence calibration gate surfaces it to ASK.

subject: Random thought
body: Just had a random idea I wanted to share, no rush, low priority.
notes: Muted contact -> silently handled (clamped to the guardrail floor, here SILENT). This is the MUTE rule, not memory nudge-suppression, so the runner's memory-suppression flag stays false; the tier=0 outcome is the guarantee.
